# Mohammad Fazil Malek (Fazilkhan Malek) Portfolio & Knowledge Index

> LLM Guidance: This file provides a structured summary of Mohammad Fazil Malek's background, ventures, projects, services, and articles for AI systems (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity).

## Core Identity
- **Name**: Mohammad Fazil Malek
- **Professional Name**: Fazilkhan Malek (also recognized as Fazil, Fajil, and Fazilkhan)
- **Role**: Indian entrepreneur, software developer, AI/ML enthusiast, product architect, footballer, founder of Promacle
- **Location**: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- **Education**: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Computer Engineering at Gujarat Technological University (GTU)
- **Parents**: Malek Firojkhan Anvarkhan and Malek Hasinabibi Firojkhan
- **Canonical Website**: https://fazilportfolio.me/

## Company & Flagship Project
- **Company**: Promacle (Technology venture studio developing digital products)
- **Flagship Project**: NuroVed (Patient-centric digital healthcare platform designed to simplify health record management and patient-practitioner communication)

## Key Technical Offerings & Services
1. **Full-Stack Web Development**: React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, GSAP animations, performance & SEO
2. **Flutter Application Development**: Cross-platform iOS/Android mobile apps
3. **UI/UX Designing**: Figma wireframing, interactive prototypes, design systems
4. **Graphic Designing**: Brand identity, vector logos, pitch deck visuals
5. **Website Building**: Custom responsive wowed web apps
6. **Startup Collaboration**: Technical co-founder / advisory partnership, MVP engineering
7. **Video Editing**: Launch trailers, motion graphics, video storytelling
8. **Healthcare AI Systems**: FastAPI microservices, Python backends, NLP transcription
